posts.copy:
Best Speakeasy in Las Vegas 2025 - Las Vegas Weekly 🏆

The Cabinet of Curiosities + The Lock speakeasy offers an experience unlike any other in Vegas. Solve our riddle, crack the vault code, and crawl through to discover The Lock - our hidden speakeasy where bespoke cocktails are crafted from your personal mood questionnaire.

🍸 Cocktails: $18-25 (Happy Hour: $12, daily 1-4 PM)
🔒 The Lock: Reservations required, 2-drink minimum  
✨ VIP rooms available: $200-300
📍 Located at Horseshoe Las Vegas

Perfect for date nights, locals looking for something special, or anyone seeking Vegas' most immersive cocktail experience.

#BestSpeakeasy #TheLockspeakeasy #CabinetOfCuriosities #VegasNightlife #DateNightVegas #HorseshoeLasVegas #SpeakeasyExperience
